title: Week of April 13, 2026
summary: This week brought significant improvements to platform stability and content organization. OpsPal now prevents documentation bloat and duplicate content issues, while licensing activation problems that could cause system loops have been resolved. Additionally, our Skills library received a comprehensive audit with 98 automation templates now properly organized and enhanced.

entries.headline: Documentation stays clean and organized automatically
details: Removes duplicate content sections that could cause confusion
Eliminates outdated legacy content that clutters documentation
Keeps documentation headers properly positioned for easy navigation

entries.headline: License activation works smoothly without getting stuck
details: Prevents endless loops when activating or renewing licenses
Shows clear warnings when your license expires within 48 hours
Handles license termination cleanly without system interruption

entries.headline: Skills library reorganized with 98 automation templates enhanced
details: Fixed naming issues with go-to-market planning and Salesforce templates
Moved test templates out of production library for cleaner experience
Added proper template structure for creating new automation skills

entries.headline: Salesforce workflow validation works with proper permissions
details: Validates Salesforce flows with correct read and write permissions
Automatically assigns proper permission sets for workflow operations
Ensures compliance with Salesforce security requirements
